body: This PR defines `array_type` for FieldVectors, which is needed in a recent Krylov.jl update.
title: Define array_type for FieldVectors

body: This PR should be a temporary fix to #1242. We should figure out what's going wrong there, though.
title: Restrict CUDA in Project.toml due to OOM issue

body:
Fixes #1226.

title: strip out unnecessary space metadata in spectral element operators

body:
This PR deprecates
 - `comm_context` in favor of using `ClimaComms.context`
and methods that assume the device is internally determined using `CUDA.functional()`, which is problematic if CUDA is available but we want to run on the CPU:
 - `HDF5Reader`
 - `HDF5Writer`
 - `Topology2D`
 - (fixes `create_dss_buffer` to use the topology context)

A step towards #1170.
title: Deprecate comm_context, use ClimaComms.context
